name: get_lp_analysis
description: LP-lock depth for $0.01 USDC: per-pool TVL, LP-locked %, LP-burn % (burned LP is locked forever), and top LP holders with lock detail. Answers "is liquidity actually locked, or just claimed to be?"

description.name: get_holder_analysis
description.description: Holder concentration & insider signals for $0.01 USDC: top-10 holder % and locked %, top-5 %, holder count, and insider-wallet detection. Flags dev/insider control of supply.

description.name: check_authorities
description.description: Token authority audit for $0.005 USDC: mint / freeze / close / balance-mutable authorities, transfer hooks, metadata mutability, Token-2022 extension risks, and malicious-creator checks. Answers "can the dev structurally rug this?"

description.name: check_tokens
description.description: Batch rug-screen up to 20 Solana mints for $0.05 USDC flat. Returns verdict, 0-100 risk score, and safeToTrade for each mint. For watchlist / portfolio / multi-candidate scans in one paid call.

description.name: get_new_tokens
description.description: Fresh Solana tokens from the recent window, PRE-SCORED with token-intel rug risk. The sniper feed: discovery + safety fused, so you find new launches that are already rug-checked. Optional filters: minutes (lookback), minLiquidityUsd, maxRisk (0-100), safeOnly, limit.
